# PinConsole
> Open-source alternative to Hotjar, FullStory, and session-replay tools — self-hosted, privacy-first, AGPL-3.0.

## Pages
- [Home](https://pinconsole.com/en/)
- [Blog](https://pinconsole.com/en/blog/)

## Blog Posts
- [AGPL-3.0 vs MIT: Why We Chose AGPL for Our Open Source Project](https://pinconsole.com/en/blog/agpl-vs-mit/)
- [How We Built a Self-Hosted Session Replay Alternative to FullStory](https://pinconsole.com/en/blog/building-self-hosted-session-replay/)
- [Building Open-Source Co-Browsing: How We Made Two Browsers Share One Session](https://pinconsole.com/en/blog/building-co-browsing/)
- [Privacy by Design in Open-Source Session Replay: Building GDPR-First Surveillance](https://pinconsole.com/en/blog/privacy-by-design/)
- [Defense in Depth for Session Replay: Building Anti-Bot Infrastructure in Go](https://pinconsole.com/en/blog/defense-in-depth/)
- [Building a Production WebSocket Hub for 500 Concurrent Session Replay Connections](https://pinconsole.com/en/blog/websocket-hub-500-concurrent/)
- [Sustainable Open Source: How AGPL-3.0 and Commercial Licensing Work for PinConsole](https://pinconsole.com/en/blog/open-source-business-model/)

- [PinConsole vs Cobrowse.io](https://pinconsole.com/en/alternatives/cobrowse-io/)
- [PinConsole vs Upscope](https://pinconsole.com/en/alternatives/upscope/)
